§6Digamma Radiation§f

§aThe most dangerous radiation type in NTM — §cnearly impossible to shield against§f!§f

§bDigamma Radiation§f is a unique form of radiation produced exclusively by §bDigamma RBMK Fuel§f when burned in an RBMK reactor. It is the most hazardous radiation type in the entire mod.

§6Properties§f:
§b• §cCannot§f be blocked by standard hazmat suits — not even tier 3 or 4 protection is sufficient
§b• Only the §bFau Armor§f provides complete resistance (99.99% reduction)
§b• Causes unique, severe effects including digamma poisoning
§b• Lingers in contaminated areas for extended periods

§6Produced By§f:
§b• §bDigamma RBMK Fuel Rods§f — when burned in an RBMK reactor
§b• §bDigamma Matter§f (Digammarium) — solid matter infused with digamma radiation

§6Protection§f:
§b• §bFau Armor§f — the only armor set with complete digamma radiation resistance
§b• §bHazmat Suits§f — provide no protection against digamma radiation
§b• §bDistance§f — the only guaranteed protection is staying far away

§cWarning§f: Digamma radiation is not to be trifled with. If you burn digamma fuel, ensure your RBMK is in a remote location and that you have Fau armor before approaching spent fuel. The effects are cumulative and permanent!

§eTip§f: Use remote monitoring and automated fuel handling where possible. Never manually handle spent digamma fuel without Fau armor protection.
